examples: We landed on a grass airstrip, fifteen minutes after leaving Mahe.
The game involves setting flight paths to safely direct jumbo jets to the large runway, smaller prop planes to the airstrip, and helicopters to the helipad.
The island even has its own private airstrip.
An ongoing programme, due for completion in 2015, is improving airstrip infrastructure across the country.
Military aircraft land at and take off from an airstrip there at all hours.
